items.name: kiwi-globals
items.title: Kiwi Global Styles
items.description: CSS variables, Tailwind tokens, and utility classes required by all kiwi-ui components. Install once and import into your root CSS.

items.name: ai-input
items.title: AI Input
items.description: An AI-powered textarea with model selector, web search toggle, mic, and send button.

items.name: inputfield
items.title: Input Field
items.description: A styled text input with optional label, placeholder, disabled, and error states.

items.name: tag-setter
items.title: Tag Setter
items.description: An animated expandable tag input with add/remove and save confirmation.

items.name: color-selector
items.title: Color Selector
items.description: A color picker with six predefined color swatches and selection indicator.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A checkbox with optional label, disabled state, and onChange callback.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: A binary on/off toggle switch with optional label and disabled state.

items.name: filter-bar
items.title: Filter Bar
items.description: An animated sort/filter selector with CSS anchor-positioned hover bubble and animated text transitions.

items.name: buttons
items.title: Buttons
items.description: Button variants: primary, danger, ghost, and muted — each with idle, hover, active, and disabled states.

items.name: environmental-switch
items.title: Environmental Switch
items.description: A light/dark mode toggle with an animated sliding pill indicator.

items.name: alert-toast
items.title: Alert Toast
items.description: A dismissible toast notification with countdown auto-dismiss timer.

items.name: update-toast
items.title: Update Toast
items.description: An update notification toast with version badge, description, and skip/install actions.

items.name: inline-alert
items.title: Inline Alert
items.description: Inline alert with four variants (info, warning, success, error), icon, description, and optional action.

items.name: dropdown
items.title: Dropdown
items.description: An animated dropdown menu with action and danger sections, keyboard shortcut hints.

items.name: label
items.title: Status Badge
items.description: A status badge with four semantic variants: pending, success, alert, and error.

items.name: radial-card
items.title: Radial Card
items.description: A 3D perspective card with mouse-tracked radial gradient glow using Framer Motion.
